environments.name: DEV
environments.description: Initial validation stage for build, tests, audits, E2E, accessibility, Python compile checks, and image build.

environments.name: QA
environments.description: Runs only after DEV succeeds and repeats the validation gates before production promotion.

environments.name: PROD
environments.description: Runs only after QA succeeds and the GitHub prod environment approval is granted.

checks: Backend build, unit tests, coverage, and production audit
Frontend production build, Playwright E2E, axe accessibility, and production audit
Python service dependency install and compile check
Docker Compose image build on CI runners with Docker available
